name: SecurityLocalGenerateCMAC
title: SecurityLocalGenerateCMAC
syntax: long SecurityLocalGenerateCMAC(byte key[], dword keyLength, byte data[], dword dataLength, byte cmac[], dword cmacLength)
description: Generates a hash for the given data and key. The generated hash is a CMAC.
return: 1: SuccessA Value of 1 means that the action was successful.
